context.projectOverview: Phase B Sprint 3 (highest complexity): wire the bounded rounds loop into FleetCoordinator + runFleet. When manifest.blackboard is set, run children for up to maxRounds rounds sharing the blackboard — scaffold each child config ONLY on round 1, re-spawn `agent-bober run` each round, early-stop when a completed round adds zero new 'finding' facts. When NO blackboard: exactly one pass, byte-identical to today. Per-child failures stay data (never throw); exit-0 contract preserved. NO synthesis file (Sprint 4).

completedSprints.title: SharedBlackboard module
completedSprints.summary: src/fleet/shared-blackboard.ts: SharedBlackboard.open({dbPath,namespace,busyTimeoutMs?,maxRounds}), publish, readSiblings, readAll (use readAll().length for the new-findings count), close. Commit e1d4b00.

completedSprints.title: config.fleet + manifest.blackboard + path injection + CLI
completedSprints.summary: manifest.blackboard {namespace, maxRounds 1-3 default 3}; resolveBlackboardPath(manifest) in src/fleet/index.ts → ABSOLUTE join(resolve(rootDir),'.bober','memory',ns,'facts.db') | undefined; scaffolder.scaffold gained optional 3rd blackboard? param that writes config.fleet {blackboardDbPath, blackboardNamespace, blackboardSubject=child.folder, maxRounds} inside an if-guard (byte-identical when absent); `agent-bober blackboard publish|read` CLI. Commit 2784f71.

relevantFiles: src/fleet/coordinator.ts (execute @ :29, runChild @ :39 never-reject thunk, scaffolder+runner DI in constructor)
src/fleet/index.ts (runFleet — coordinator.execute @ :118, aggregate @ :120, report build+write @ :124; resolveBlackboardPath added in Sprint 2)
src/fleet/scaffolder.ts (Sprint 2 — writes fleet section; confirm it no-ops/can be guarded when folder exists)

principlesRef: .bober/principles.md — ESM .js imports, import type, node:fs/promises only (ensureDir for db dir), unicode section headers, conventional commits 'bober(sprint-3): ...'. CRITICAL invariants: (a) no-blackboard path byte-identical (branch: if (!manifest.blackboard) return existing single execute, open NO blackboard); (b) scaffold once per child (round 1 only); (c) re-spawn runner each round; (d) early-stop on no-new-findings (readAll().length unchanged after round r>1); (e) never-throw / exit-0 contract preserved — per-child failures stay data; (f) still write fleet-report.json from the FINAL round.
